name: Trip stats API endpoints
description: Expose the trip data computed by trip-aggregator-worker over HTTP so the frontend can render summaries. Two endpoints: one for a single device's lifetime totals + recent trip list (dashboard-home consumes this), and one for a single trip by route_id (route detail page can overlay stats).
acceptance_criteria: GET /v1/devices/:dongle_id/stats returns JSON { totals: {trip_count, total_distance_meters, total_duration_seconds, total_engaged_seconds}, recent: [Trip...] } using the SumTripStatsByDongleID and ListTripsByDongleID queries; recent list is limited to 20 by default with optional ?limit= ?offset=
GET /v1/routes/:dongle_id/:route_name/trip returns the Trip row for that route (404 if not yet aggregated)
Both endpoints are registered in internal/api/route.go or a new internal/api/trip.go following the existing Echo group pattern
Both endpoints require JWT auth via the existing auth middleware
internal/api/trip_test.go covers: 200 happy path for both endpoints, 404 when the trip row does not exist, 401 without JWT, and correct pagination for ?limit= ?offset=
go vet ./... and go build ./... pass cleanly
